items.name: Mask of the Absolver
items.description: The Mask of the Absolver led wearers down a path to enlightenment, But the curse corrupted them, driving the mask wielders to punish foes relentlessly and causing madness. In the end, the wearer  becomes the very thing they sought to destroy.
